cards.title: Google Home Speaker Gets Gemini AI Upgrade
cards.body: Google's new $99.99 Home Speaker replaces rigid voice commands with conversational Gemini interactions. The company is betting generative AI can revitalize the smart speaker market.

cards.title: Anthropic Joins Frontier Carbon Removal Coalition
cards.body: Anthropic became the first AI startup to join the Frontier coalition. The coalition received an additional $915M in pledges to fund carbon removal projects.

cards.title: World Model Maker Odyssey Reaches $1.45B Valuation
cards.body: Odyssey, backed by Amazon and other major investors, has raised funding at a $1.45B valuation. World models represent the next frontier in AI beyond large language models.

cards.title: Pramaana Labs Raises $27M for AI Verification
cards.body: Khosla Ventures led Pramaana Labs' seed round to bring formal verification to AI systems. The startup targets sensitive sectors like law, drug discovery, and tax preparation.

cards.title: DeepL Acquires Mixhalo for Event Audio Translation
cards.body: DeepL acquired Mixhalo to expand live-event audio streaming and translation capabilities. The company is opening a San Francisco office to scale its U.S. operations.

cards.title: Pinterest Launches Ask Pinterest AI Shopping App
cards.body: Pinterest unveiled 'Ask Pinterest,' an experimental AI-powered shopping app with conversational recommendations. The app lets users seek inspiration through natural language interactions.

cards.title: Android 17 Launches With Gemini AI Features
cards.body: Google released Android 17 and Wear OS 7 with new multitasking and parental controls. A Pixel Drop brings the latest Google AI models to devices.

cards.title: SpaceX Valuation Surges to $2.6 Trillion
cards.body: SpaceX's valuation increased by $1 trillion since its IPO launch on Friday. The company briefly surpassed Amazon in market value.

cards.title: Anthropic Business Growth Continues Despite Trump Tensions
cards.body: Anthropic's popularity with enterprise users is growing significantly, according to Ramp data. Recent government tensions may paradoxically boost the company's adoption.

cards.title: Enterprises Grapple With AI ROI Reality Check
cards.body: Silicon Valley's 'tokenmaxxing' trend has given way to budget constraints as companies face actual AI costs. Uber and others exhausted annual AI budgets in months.

cards.title: World Leaders Fear U.S. AI Dominance Dependency
cards.body: French President Macron and Indian PM Modi raised concerns at G7 about U.S. control over AI access. The Anthropic blackout highlighted risks of overnight service cuts.

cards.title: Social Media Platforms Enable User Algorithm Control
cards.body: Threads, Instagram, and TikTok are introducing tools for users to customize their recommendation algorithms. The shift gives consumers more control over their feeds.

cards.title: Only 16 Percent Americans Optimistic About AI
cards.body: A Pew Research study shows Americans are significantly less optimistic about AI than Wall Street. Most don't expect positive societal impact from the technology.

cards.title: Canadian Pension Fund Bets on India Data Centers
cards.body: A major Canadian pension giant will acquire an 8.2% stake in CtrlS Datacenters. The investment supports India's AI infrastructure boom.

cards.title: AI Labs Outsource Robot Training Data Collection
cards.body: AI companies are hiring specialized firms like XDOF to collect physical robot training data. Solving data challenges is critical for physical AI to match LLM progress.

cards.title: How to turn off AI in your Google Docs
cards.body: Google's Gemini writing suggestions in Docs are generating unwanted pop-ups for users. Here's how to disable the 'write with Gemini' feature.

cards.title: Enterprises still figuring out their AI ROI
cards.body: Companies that aggressively pushed AI adoption earlier this year are now facing budget constraints. Uber burned through its annual AI budget in months, forcing some firms to cut Claude licenses.

cards.title: World leaders fear U.S. control over American AI
cards.body: French President Macron and Indian PM Modi raised concerns at the G7 that the U.S. could cut off AI access overnight. The Anthropic blackout highlighted this geopolitical vulnerability.

cards.title: Anthropic joins Frontier carbon removal coalition
cards.body: Anthropic has become the first AI startup to join the Frontier coalition, which received $915M in new pledges for carbon removal projects.

cards.title: World models startup Odyssey hits $1.45B valuation
cards.body: Odyssey, backed by Amazon and other major investors, is positioning world models as the next frontier beyond LLMs. The funding round cements the startup as a key player in AI development.

cards.title: Only 16% of Americans see AI as positive
cards.body: A Pew Research study reveals a stark disconnect between Wall Street's enthusiasm and public skepticism about AI. Most everyday Americans doubt the technology will benefit society.

cards.title: Google's Gemini smart speaker reinvents home AI
cards.body: Google's new $99.99 Home Speaker replaces rigid voice commands with conversational Gemini interactions. The device signals Google's bet on generative AI for the smart home market.

cards.title: Robot training data collection remains unglamorous
cards.body: Physical AI development requires massive amounts of training data from tedious data collection work. Some AI labs are already outsourcing this labor-intensive process.

cards.title: Pramaana Labs raises $27M for AI formal verification
cards.body: Khosla Ventures backed the startup to bring rigorous verification methods to AI systems. Pramaana targets sensitive verticals like law and drug discovery where reliability is critical.

cards.title: DeepL acquires Mixhalo for AI audio translation
cards.body: DeepL expanded into live-event audio streaming and translation through the Mixhalo acquisition. The move marks DeepL's opening of a San Francisco office to strengthen U.S. operations.

cards.title: Pinterest launches AI-powered shopping app 'Ask'
cards.body: Ask Pinterest is an experimental AI chatbot that lets users seek shopping recommendations through conversation. The app brings generative AI to Pinterest's core shopping experience.

cards.title: Anthropic's government feud may boost adoption
cards.body: Business user data suggests Anthropic's popularity is growing despite tensions with the Trump administration. The latest conflict may actually strengthen the company's market position.

cards.title: Android 17 brings expanded Gemini AI features
cards.body: Google released Android 17 and Wear OS 7 with new multitasking tools and AI enhancements. The Pixel Drop brings the latest Google AI models directly to devices.

cards.title: Military increasingly relies on AI advisors
cards.body: An exclusive MIT Technology Review eBook compiles stories on how militaries deploy AI for decision-making. The collection spans six reports updated through April 2026.

cards.title: Brain implant user becomes AI speech pioneer
cards.body: Casey Harrell, who has ALS, has been using a brain-computer interface for nearly three years to communicate. He's now recognized as the first major 'power user' of BCI technology.

cards.title: South Korea's AI obsession reshapes society
cards.body: Seoul leads the world in AI adoption, from unmanned immigration checkpoints to widespread AI integration. The nation's embrace of AI reflects both technological innovation and cultural priorities.

cards.title: AI coding agents teach robots hardware skills
cards.body: AI agents successfully trained robots to perform hardware installation tasks like mounting GPUs. The development demonstrates AI's expanding role in physical robotics.

cards.title: Dangerous AI models coming regardless
cards.body: Experts warn that advanced AI models with dangerous capabilities are inevitable. Regulation and safety measures cannot prevent their eventual development.

cards.title: Anthropic pauses Claude Agent SDK token billing
cards.body: Anthropic has temporarily halted token-based billing for its Claude Agent SDK. The move addresses concerns from developers about pricing models.

cards.title: Pentagon uses AI to write congressional reports
cards.body: The U.S. military has deployed AI systems to automate report writing for mandated congressional documents. The development highlights government adoption of AI technologies.
